title: Gutzlaffia graminea
intro: Gutzlaffia graminea is a plant species native to India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rutaceae and commonly known as Wild Rue. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Bioactive constituents of Gutzlaffia graminea include flavonoids, coumarins, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare various herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
